saints.name: Holy Virgin Martyr Theodosίa of Tyre

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Be quick to anticipate...”)
Through your struggles in the contest,  / you offered the God-given gift of your virginity to the Word;  / therefore, He brought you to the heavenly Bridal Chamber.  /  O prize-winner, intercede with the Master of all,  / that He may deliver us from all manner of misfortunes.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “Be quick to anticipate...”)
As a pure virgin and prize-winner,   / you were spiritually betrothed to the King of Heaven,   / O all-praised Theodosίa, entreat Him for the salvation of our souls

saints.name: Repose of the Blessed John of Ustiug the Fool-for-Christ

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father John, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

kontakion.text: O most wise John, you did not love earthly glory,  / so you became a fool, /  desiring to inherit the Kingdom of Heaven,  / you received beatings and insults, and endured nakedness and heat;  / now that you rejoice with the Angels,  / pray to Christ God for our souls.

saints.name: Virgin Martyr Theodosia the Nun of Constantinople

troparion.text: Your lamb Theodosia, O Jesus, / calls out to You in a loud voice: / I love You, O my bridegroom, / and in seeking You, I endure suffering. / In Baptism I was crucified so that I might reign in You, / and died so that I might live with You. / Accept me as a pure sacrifice, / for I have offered myself in love. / By her prayers save our souls, since You are merciful.

kontakion.text: You were betrothed to the King of Heaven / as a pure and trophy-bearing martyr. / Entreat Him to save our souls, praiseworthy Theodosia.

saints.name: Icon of the Mother of God “the Surety of Sinners”

kontakion.text: You have been an honorable dwelling of the inexpressible Divine nature, beyond words and beyond understanding; /  and are a Surety for sinners, granting grace and healing;  / as the Mother of Him Who rules all,  / pray to your Son that we may receive mercy on the Day of Judgment.

saints.name: Martyred Fathers and Mothers of Atchara

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!
